text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Daiwa Scarlet and I go to watch a race
for field research.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What an amazing race! There's a lot to learn from
watching the real thing once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One of the racers who lost wraps her arms around
herself and sobs.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I'm sorry... I... I...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
...No need to apologize. You did great. You'll get
'em next time.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
You don't get it, Trainer... You gave me this
wonderful signature racewear, and I...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I failed! I couldn't run well enough to be worthy of
these clothes!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Let's go, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet leaves in a hurry, so I scramble to
follow her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Daiwa Scarlet stays silent the entire way back.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I understand how she feels.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I love my signature racewear too.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Just putting it on fills me with energy. It's my
number one outfit to wear.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Maybe that's why... I'm all too aware of how she
feels.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The way she apologized to her signature
racewear... I get it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: And for a second—just a second—I felt scared.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Scared that someday, I might be the one letting
my signature racewear down...
choice_data_list: You really care about it a lot, huh?
You really care about it a lot, huh?

What's important is that you stay true to
yourself.

What's important is that you stay true to
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Scared that someday, I might be the one letting
my signature racewear down...
choice_data_list: You really care about it a lot, huh?
You really care about it a lot, huh?

What's important is that you stay true to
yourself.

What's important is that you stay true to
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I do. I really do. That's why I need to live
up to the expectations that come with it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
When I step onto the track, I want to wear it the
best I can.
choice_data_list: And do you think you're there yet?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I think...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...I think, if I'm going to wear the number one
racewear, I've got to be my number one self.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And if I'm still cowering over the thought of
losing, like I am now...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Then no, I'm not there yet. I'm still not who I want
to be...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All right! I feel like the fog has lifted. No more
moping around!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...Thanks, Trainer. I'm more determined than ever
to be number one.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Along with my signature racewear, that is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sparkle returns to Daiwa Scarlet's eyes. It
seems like she's renewed her resolve.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Stay true to myself, huh...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're right. If I'm getting this worried before I
even start running, I've already lost.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If I really am number one—and I am—I'll make my
outfit reflect that, no problem.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I don't have time to get cold feet or
mope around feeling sorry for myself.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All right! I feel like the fog has lifted. It's time to
focus on the present rather than worry about the
future!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Trainer. I'll make sure I become number
one—in the way that only I can.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Along with my signature racewear, that is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sparkle returns to Daiwa Scarlet's eyes. It
seems like she's renewed her resolve.
